parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct:free', temperature: 0.2, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are an intent classifier for an executive assistant. Classify the user message into one of three categories: query (information search/RAG), action (calendar/email/file operations), or report (summary/analysis). Respond ONLY with JSON: {"intent": "query|action|report", "confidence": 0.0-1.0, "details": {}}' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.message }] }) }}
